comment: Web Awesome Pro components by tag - FALLBACK ONLY for releases before 3.3.0. Pro-ness is not recorded in the CEM; since 3.3.0 Export-WaApiSurface.ps1 derives it automatically from the reference docs bundled in the release zip (dist/skills/webawesome/references/components/<name>.md, '[Pro]' in the first heading). This list is consulted only when no bundled references exist and therefore reflects the pre-3.3.0 state (wa-page was Pro back then; it is free/stable as of 3.5.0).
